headline: Entrepreneur - free palestine 🇵🇸
summary:
Experienced Entrepreneur with a demonstrated history of working in the information technology and services industry. 

Strong business development professional who has started businesses in diverse sectors.

Currently the CEO of "Wareed", A health-tech Startup that has the vision of revolutionizing healthcare to patients by delivering it to where they are.

recommendations:
Piet van Paassen

When Raif was introduced to me he was a trainee with Shell. I was asked to coach him for several months. During these months I was amazed with his speed of learning and his attention to detail at the same time. Way faster than anybody had expected, he was offered the chance to become a supervisor on one of my hoists. Despite his young age he proved to be an efficient leader for a group of people that did not always make life easy. I found that he works better as pressure increases. Raif is a very ambitious guy that cannot do half a job or do a job which has only half his interest. This does not only count for his working career but surely also for his private life. He is determined to make a difference in this life. We spend also considerable time in the evening hours. Although there is quite some cultural difference between the two of us we never came across a subject that we could not discuss which indicates that he has a strict adherence to his principles but a open ear for other opinions at the same time. His emotional intelligence is way ahead of his age. This is probably what made him so efficient in leading a difficult group of people on his hoist. I would not even bother asking him for any average job but strongly recommend him for any high demanding function or career path.
